de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model

Interface ISymbolicLayout

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ISymbolicElement
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    SymbolicLayout, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessLayout

    public interface ISymbolicLayout
extends ISymbolicElement

    This interface represents the root element of a symbolic memory layout.

    A symbolic memory layout defines how a heap and stack looks like and which objects are the same (equivalent classes). Such memory layouts can be created automatically via a SymbolicLayoutExtractor and saved/loaded via SymbolicLayoutWriter/SymbolicLayoutReader.

    The default implementation is SymbolicLayout.

    See Also:
    SymbolicLayoutExtractor, SymbolicLayoutWriter, SymbolicLayoutReader, SymbolicLayout

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<ISymbolicEquivalenceClass> getEquivalenceClasses()
      Returns the equivalence classes.
      ImmutableList<ISymbolicObject> getObjects()
      Returns all available symbolic objects.
      ISymbolicState getState()
      Returns the symbolic state.
